title: Public-safe data filtering
description: Ensure scraper diagnostics, connector/source internals and health, admin metadata, source_settings credentials, and private notes are excluded before serialization on every public-reachable route and API response, not merely hidden in templates.
acceptance_criteria: Public routes/responses never include source_settings credential fields (e.g. eBay app_id/cert_id), connector health/diagnostics, or admin metadata, verified at the response-payload level not just the rendered HTML
Private notes and candidate-listing data belonging to any user are absent from every public response
Filtering happens in the data-preparation layer before template rendering, not solely via Jinja conditionals
A test asserts the raw HTTP response body of every public route contains none of the excluded fields, using a fixture project seeded with credentials/notes/diagnostics to catch regressions
